body_txt: This is, quite literally, the power to manipulate biology and biological lifeforms (mostly animals, usually not plants ) note for some reason , if biomanipulators and Green Thumb users coexist in a setting, then the two categories will never overlap, and the former will always be 10000% evil , also referred to as biomancy, biokinesis, sarkakinesis, fleshwarping, fleshcrafting and more. Depending on the setting and the power level, it may vary in range (long-range vs. strictly hands-on), comprehensiveness (e.g., can only affect humans), or scope (e.g., limited to the user's own biology). This is potentially a very broad power , with its capabilities including, but not limited to: note Note that all of these abilities may stand on their own Healing Hands and/or Healing Factor , Psychic Surgery , Shapeshifting , Shapeshifter Weapon , Bio-Augmentation and/or Body Horror . Usually a Lovecraftian Superpower when wielded by bad guys. Super-Trope of Master of Your Domain , which is when you manipulate your own biology. Compare with Organic Technology and Artistic License – Biology . Compare also Creating Life , where you can outright create biological lifeforms instead of just manipulating them.
